statement: In every magma, Equation 4211 (`x * y = ((z * y) * x) * w`) implies Equation 4242 (`x * y = ((z * w) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0507
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z y) x) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z w) x) x)
